name: Sarvam-1 (2B)
archDisplay: 2B dense transformer with custom Indic-optimized tokenizer
note: India's first from-scratch open foundation model; 2B params trained on 4T tokens with a low-fertility tokenizer for 10 Indic languages plus English; base text-completion model, not chat-tuned.
verificationNotes: Confirmed real release: Sarvam AI's official HF model card, Sarvam's own Oct 24 2024 X/Twitter launch announcement, and independent coverage (MediaNama) all corroborate a 2B-parameter model trained on 4T tokens for 10 Indic languages + English under a non-commercial license, built with NVIDIA H100s. All three result rows (MMLU 44.44, ARC-Challenge 58.50, TriviaQA 90.62) are literally present on https://huggingface.co/sarvamai/sarvam-1. Context length 8192 (8K) confirmed via model config (max_position_embeddings). No corrections made — record verified as accurate.
